cards.front: What is the purpose of the `str.contains()` method in Pandas?
cards.back: To search for a specified value in a string vector

cards.front: What is the `dt` attribute in Pandas Series?
cards.back: Represents a datetime object with access to its components

cards.front: What is the `shift()` function in Pandas?
cards.back: Adds or subtracts a specified value from each element of a Time Series

cards.front: What is the `resample()` function in Pandas?
cards.back: Resamples a Time Series to a specified frequency

cards.front: What is the `yearofmonth()` method in Pandas?
cards.back: Returns the year of the month of a datetime object
